ItacPersonItem.Notes: Galeazzo Gualengo was among the founders of the Intrepidi Academy. A short note dedicated to Galeazzo is in his father`s biography, Camillo Gualengo, by Laura Turchi, in DBI
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
